market_summary: Regime (pack): MIXED. SPY 1m=-1.77% and QQQ 1m=+0.33% with MA50=false for both (trend not repaired), while GLD remains a clear leader (1m=+2.47%, 3m=+16.04%, MA50/MA200=true).

Breadth/leadership (pack): leadership is still concentrated in real assets/energy/defense + select semicap tooling. In-book momentum leaders: KLAC mom=+44.91% (but dd63=-22.41%, vol20=46.87%), TSM mom=+37.03%, XOM mom=+32.35%, GLD mom=+29.93%, LMT mom=+26.55%.

Go/No-go (IC): NO-GO for rebalance (rebalance due today=false; cadence constraint). Maintain portfolio unchanged; only monitor for thesis damage (AVGO weaker 3m; LLY 30d weakness; KLAC elevated drawdown/volatility).

thesis_damage_flags.why: Pack shows near-term momentum/price pressure (1m=-10.20%, 3m=-12.27%, dd63=-15.90%) which conflicts with the fund’s momentum sleeve; fundamentals snapshot is partially incomplete/buggy for FY2025 (multiple key ratios read as implausible/NULL -> treat as UNKNOWN for this period).

Pack momentum is lagging vs core leaders (1m=-3.38%, 3m=-5.26%, dd63=-13.13%) while valuation is elevated (P/E ~62.9, EV/EBITDA ~43.4 ttm) with modest growth (rev growth ~6.9%, earnings growth ~8.0% ttm), increasing downside sensitivity in a mixed regime.
Despite strong pack momentum (mom=+44.91%), risk is elevated (dd63=-22.41%, vol20=46.87%), raising whipsaw risk if the broad trend (SPY/QQQ MA50=false) fails to repair.

thesis: Catalyst (next 30d): none acted today (non-rebalance day). Maintain barbell: real-asset/energy/defense ballast (GLD/XOM/LMT) plus semicap leaders (NVDA/AVGO/TSM/KLAC) and pharma quality (LLY).

Factor edge: with SPY/QQQ MA50=false (pack), turnover is penalized; current book remains concentrated in the strongest 90d momentum cluster (KLAC/TSM/XOM/GLD/LMT) while keeping high-quality compounders (NVDA op margin ~65.6% ttm; ROIC ~1.20 ttm).

Variant view: resist forcing an early rotation into a new momentum add (e.g., GOOGL mom=+29.46% pack) until the next eligible rebalance window; use time to watch for thesis damage in AVGO (weaker 3m + expensive) and LLY (30d down).
risks: Macro: renewed equity/rates shock could pressure high-multiple semis (NVDA/AVGO/TSM/KLAC) even with partial ballast from GLD/XOM/LMT.
Idiosyncratic: AI capex or export-control headline risk for semis; obesity-drug pricing/regulatory headlines could hit LLY; energy price reversal could weaken XOM despite current momentum.
Execution/liquidity: none today (no trades). Next eligible rebalance should stage orders for higher-vol names (KLAC/TSM/NVDA) to reduce slippage/whipsaw.
falsifiable_checks: Regime check (pack, through next eligible rebalance): if SPY MA50 remains false AND SPY 1m stays < 0, keep ballast (GLD+XOM+LMT) >= 30% combined and avoid adding incremental high-beta exposure.

Holding risk check (pack, through next eligible rebalance): if AVGO 3m stays <= -5% AND NVDA/TSM/KLAC maintain positive 3m, prioritize AVGO as first trim/replace candidate; if KLAC dd63 deteriorates to <= -30%, consider sizing down at the next rebalance checkpoint.
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: rebalance not permitted today (spacing constraint), and pack trend (SPY/QQQ MA50=false) argues for low turnover. Bull: existing leaders (GLD/XOM/LMT + KLAC/TSM) continue to carry the 90d momentum signal. Bear: if the mixed regime breaks down, avoiding churn preserves optionality and reduces trading-cost drag; reassess at the next eligible rebalance with updated pack momentum plus any fresh thesis-damage headlines.

constraints_check.notes: Appendix — factor scores (qual): Momentum leaders (pack): KLAC 44.91, TSM 37.03, XOM 32.35, GLD 29.93, LMT 26.55; laggards in-book: LLY 3m=-12.27, AVGO 3m=-5.26. Quality snapshot (tool): NVDA op margin ~65.6%, ROIC ~1.20, P/E ~38; TSM op margin ~54.0%, P/E ~28.7; XOM P/E ~17.6, EV/EBITDA ~8.0; KLAC op margin ~43.3%, P/E ~35.0; AVGO P/E ~62.9, EV/EBITDA ~43.4; LLY key ratios FY2025 partially UNKNOWN/implausible in snapshot -> de-weight confidence. Risk budget: semis ~50% (NVDA+AVGO+TSM+KLAC) balanced by ballast ~36% (GLD+XOM+LMT); no crypto. Scenario stress (quick): Equity index shock hits semis most; rates shock pressures duration (NVDA/AVGO) but GLD/XOM offset; commodity shock: oil down hurts XOM, gold down hurts GLD; USD up could pressure TSM ADR. Execution plan: no trades today; next rebalance use staged sizing for KLAC/TSM/NVDA and prioritize any AVGO action if momentum/valuation divergence persists. Monitoring/kill-switch: if SPY/QQQ MA50 stays false and breadth narrows further, keep ballast >=30%; if KLAC dd63 <= -30% or AVGO 3m <= -10% with no positive catalyst, queue trim/replace at next eligible checkpoint.
